package rulecoverage

func NegativeHandlerCallsRepositoryDirectlyWithoutService() string {
    ruleID := "handler_calls_repository_directly_without_service"
    family := "architecture"
    severity := "warning"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description := "Handlers that bypass a visible service layer and call repositories or query helpers directly for business orchestration."
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
